narrative: Senior NLP Engineer with eight years’ experience at Ola, a product‑focused company, based in Kolkata. Strong verified skill depth in machine‑learning and retrieval—particularly Learning to Rank, Qdrant, pgvector, and TensorFlow—propelled the ranking, while a solid breadth of technical skills and product‑company background added further weight. Demonstrated experience building NLP pipelines with Haystack aligns directly with the search and retrieval focus of the role. However, limited platform engagement and a minor trust flag suggest a quieter professional presence and some uncertainty in profile credibility. Availability in Pune/Noida is unclear, which could affect location fit.
